summary.intent: Refactor gossamer from an Electron desktop app into a VS Code extension to reduce install friction, and add a VS Code-native UI experience with session viewer, checkpoint tree, search, MCP server, and image support.
summary.outcome: Successfully refactored into an npm workspaces monorepo with packages/core (extracted indexing logic) and packages/vscode (VS Code extension). The extension is functional with sessions list, session detail tabs, native checkpoint tree view, QuickPick search with FTS, MCP server embedded at /mcp, file watchers replacing polling, and image rendering in session detail. Several architectural pivots were made during implementation.

repo: Gossamer uses a per-project SQLite DB architecture: each repo in ~/.gossamer/config.json has its own dbPath, not a shared DB
The data pipeline is: Entire.io CLI → git branch (entire/checkpoints/v1) → gossamer indexer → SQLite DB → display
Entire.io is detected by the presence of .entire/settings.json at the repo root
CheckpointIdGitOidJoin table maps checkpointId to gitOid; ShadowSession.cwd gives the repo path needed for git operations
The server uses a single repoDir set at startup, but sessions can come from multiple repos — per-session cwd must be used for git operations
better-sqlite3 is a native module compiled against system Node.js (MODULE_VERSION 141), incompatible with VS Code's bundled Electron Node.js (MODULE_VERSION 140)
Image content blocks are stored in full.jsonl on the entire/checkpoints/v1 branch but were previously dropped during indexing (no schema fields for imageData/imageMediaType)
The branch-log endpoint uses exact repo path matching, which fails when session cwd is a subdirectory of the registered repo root — requires prefix matching via findRepoForPath()
FTS5 full-text search is available via /api/search?q= against chat history
The server's /api/sessions endpoint used global basename(repoDir) for repoName instead of per-session basename(cwd)

code.finding: Originally only listed specific files in 'include' (extension.ts, GossamerPanel.ts) causing SessionDetailPanel.ts and diffUtils.ts to never compile — blank diff views were the symptom
Prisma import path from packages/core/src/ should be ../prisma/generated/client/index.js (one level up), not ../../prisma/... (two levels)
Vite root must be an absolute path using resolve(__dirname, 'src/webview') — relative paths resolve relative to CWD where vite is invoked, not the package directory
process.execPath in VS Code extension host points to VS Code's bundled Electron node, not system node — use execFileSync('which', ['node']) to get system node for spawning child processes
acquireVsCodeApi() can only be called once per webview context — must use singleton pattern and expose as window.__vscodeApi for inline scripts to share
Sessions were sorted only by updatedAt; current workspace sessions should sort first using cwd prefix match against repoDir
Auto-scroll on initial load: scroll useEffect should depend on loading becoming false, not on renderItems change — scrollHeight is 0 until React commits content to DOM
LogContent model had no fields for image data — imageData (String?) and imageMediaType (String?) must be added to support Claude image outputs and user image inputs

workflow: VS Code webview scripts must use type='module' when Vite builds ESM output, otherwise the browser silently ignores the script tag
VS Code's native diff editor (vscode.diff command) requires Uri arguments — use TextDocumentContentProvider with a custom URI scheme for in-memory content rather than writing temp files
Vite builds ESM with content-hashed filenames by default; configure entryFileNames and assetFileNames in rollupOptions to get deterministic asset/index.js output
VS Code TreeView resourceUri set to absolute file Uri automatically applies SCM color decorations matching Explorer — free color-coding for added/modified/deleted files
When VS Code webview panel is moved to a new window it reloads from scratch — extension host must re-send initialization messages via onDidChangeViewState
fs.watch on .db-wal files catches SQLite WAL-mode writes nearly instantly (50ms debounce); watching .git/refs/ recursively catches loose ref updates for shadow branch indexing
MCP StreamableHTTPServerTransport with sessionIdGenerator: undefined enables stateless mode where each POST is independent — simpler than session-based transport for tool-only servers
npm workspace -w flag requires the workspace 'name' field value (gossamer-vscode), not the directory name (vscode)

friction: Native module version mismatch (better-sqlite3 MODULE_VERSION 141 vs VS Code's 140) required significant architecture pivot to spawn server as child process using system node

tsconfig.extension.json only listing specific files caused silent compilation failures — SessionDetailPanel.ts and diffUtils.ts were never compiled, manifesting as blank diff views with no error message
Vite relative root path resolved against CWD not package directory, causing 'Cannot resolve entry module index.html' that required investigation
Content provider URI encoding approach for diffs was abandoned after blank page issues — root cause was the tsconfig problem, not the URI approach, but this wasn't known at the time
Server not rebuilt after adding /api/v2/checkpoints/:id/file endpoint caused 'Cannot GET' errors — running server served old compiled JS
Branch-log endpoint used exact path matching so it silently returned nothing when session cwd was a repo subdirectory
Schema push created a new ~/.gossamer/gossamer.db instead of updating the existing per-project databases — required manual SQLite column addition and stray file cleanup
Electron app changes were accidentally made before realizing the user was working entirely in VS Code
Mantine ScrollArea viewport ref is null at useEffect([]) time, making scroll position tracking unreliable — required inline check instead of separate scroll listener
acquireVsCodeApi() single-call constraint caused conflict between inline minimize button script and React app — required window.__vscodeApi singleton pattern
open_items: Session naming: show session name in sessions table instead of session ID when a rename event exists (tabled during session)
Existing sessions need manual re-sync to pick up images now that imageData/imageMediaType fields are indexed
The Electron app is broken/untested after the monorepo refactor — it was explicitly allowed to break but never cleaned up
MCP stdio wrapper (dist/mcp.js) still works but has fixed-port dependency — no discovery mechanism if port changes
AssistantCard in EventItem.tsx renders highlighted plain text when matchTerms present, losing markdown formatting for search results
Collapsible checkpoint sidebar inside webview (for standalone windows where sidebar tree is unavailable) was discussed but not implemented
Image support for tool_result content blocks (screenshots from computer use) not explicitly verified
The testing git worktree at ~/gossamer-testing is on branch 'testing' branched from 'mcp' — needs periodic merges to stay current
The gossamer.togglePanel keybinding was changed from Cmd+Shift+G (conflicted with Source Control) to Ctrl+K G, but users may not discover this
